### Summary of Changes

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Testing improvements
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement

## Testing Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes

### Functionality Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser testing done (if UI changes)
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness verified (if UI changes)

### Integration Testing
- [ ] API endpoints tested (if backend changes)
- [ ] Database operations verified
- [ ] External service integrations working
- [ ] Authentication/authorization tested

## Deployment/Build Verification

- [ ] Backend builds successfully (`mvn clean install` for Java, `pip install` for Python)

- [ ] No build warnings introduced

### Deployment Checklist
- [ ] Environment variables configured
- [ ] Database migrations applied (if any)
- [ ] Static assets uploaded
- [ ] Services restart successfully
- [ ] Health checks pass
